headline: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) Earnings Beat Fuels After-Hours Rally
summary: Chipotle (CMG) beats Q1 2026 estimates with surprise sales growth, sparking a 5.7% after-hours rally. Positive transactions return after a challenging year.

headline: VIX Climbs as Fed Decision and Mega-Cap Earnings Keep Investors on Edge
summary: The CBOE Volatility Index (^VIX) is hovering near 18 on Wednesday morning, up roughly 1% as traders position ahead of the Federal Reserve’s afternoon policy decision and mega-cap technology earnings. The fear gauge closed at 17.83 on Tuesday, sitting inside the historically normal 15 to 20 band but well off the 31.05 peak hit on ... headline: CHIPOTLE TO GIVE AWAY UP TO $2 MILLION IN FREE BURRITOS TO TEACHERS AND HEALTHCARE WORKERS
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) announced today that it will award up to 200,000 teachers and healthcare workers with free entrée e-gift cards, totaling as much as $2 million in free Chipotle, as part of its annual Teacher Appreciation Week and National Nurses Week celebration. Last year, the program received its highest participation to date, reinforcing the impact of Chipotle's community recognition programs. Since 2016, the company has given away more than $16 million in free Chipotle to t

summary: The "Caviar Cruise" stock screener identifies long-term quality investments. Chipotle (CMG) excels with 22% ROIC, zero debt, and 103% profit quality, making it a strong candidate for disciplined, growth-focused portfolios despite its premium valuation.

headline: Chipotle Has a ‘Recipe for Growth.’ Wall Street Is Optimistic.
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill  struggling with declining same-restaurant sales, needs to convince consumers that its burritos and bowls are still worth the price.  Investors will learn more from the company’s earnings report on Wednesday.  Much of Chipotle’s recent growth has been driven by new restaurant openings.
